mnemonics.title: Weighted KNN Principle
mnemonics.content: CLOSER COUNTS MORE - Closer neighbors have higher weights and thus more influence on classification.

mnemonics.title: Weighting Schemes
mnemonics.content: I SEE - Inverse, Squared, Exponential weighting schemes for distance-based weights.

mnemonics.title: Nearest Centroid Characteristics
mnemonics.content: FAST MEAN - Fast predictions using Mean centroids for each class.

mnemonics.title: Algorithm Comparison
mnemonics.content: KNN Stores All, Centroid Stores Center - KNN stores all data points, Centroid stores only center points.

mnemonics.title: When to Use Which
mnemonics.content: Complex Boundaries: KNN, Simple Speed: Centroid - Use KNN for complex boundaries, Centroid for simple fast classification.
